StructurePhase.Reference: Taylor A., Doyle N.J., Kagle B.J., J. Less-Common Met., v3 p265 (1961)
StructurePhase.Comment: ANX: N. LPF Collection Code: 250043. Polymorphism: High temperature phase. Sample Preparation: Compound Preparation: arc-melted. CRUCIBLE: copper hearth. ATMOSPHERE: argon. Sample annealed at 2148 K under vacuum, quenched. Calculated Pattern Original Remarks: metal, superconductor. Article Title: THE CONSTITUTION DIAGRAM OF THE MOLYBDENUM-HAFNIUM BINARY SYSTEM. Minor Warning: No e.s.d reported/abstracted on the cell dimension. No R factor reported/abstracted. Wyckoff Sequence: a. Unit Cell Data Source: Powder Diffraction.
